query:
select distinct br.room_number
               from booking_rooms br
               join bookings b on b.id = br.booking_id
               where br.room_id = any($1)
                 and br.status = 'active'
                 and b.status  = 'active'
                 and b.check_in  < $3
                 and b.check_out > $2
                 and b.id != $4
               order by br.room_number
